task1.title: Maps: Town of Porth Harbour (Past vs Present)
task1.prompt:
The maps below show the town of Porth Harbour in 2000 and how it looks today.

Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

Write at least 150 words.

task2.title: Opinion: Road Safety - Punishments vs Other Measures
task2.prompt:
Some people think that strict punishments for driving offences are the key to reducing traffic accidents. Others, however, believe that other measures would be more effective in improving road safety.

Discuss both these views and give your own opinion.

Give reasons for your answer and include any relevant examples from your own knowledge or experience.

Write at least 250 words.
